name: Kimi-Dev-72B
metaDescription: Kimi-Dev-72B (Moonshot AI (Kimi)), released 2025-06 — part of the Kimi-Dev line. 72B coding LLM (built on Qwen2.5-72B, RL-tuned) reaching 60.4% on SWE-bench Ve…
overview: Kimi-Dev-72B is a large language model from Moonshot AI (Kimi), part of the Kimi-Dev line. Released 2025-06. Open-weight coding model line specialized for software-engineering tasks like bug fixing and patch generation.
What's notable in this version: 72B coding LLM (built on Qwen2.5-72B, RL-tuned) reaching 60.4% on SWE-bench Verified, a then-SOTA for open-source coding models. MIT license.
